evals.prompt: Build a prefab from this detection JSON at /tmp/level_complete_detection.json. It's a level-complete popup with a dim overlay, popup card, title, 3 stars in a HorizontalLayoutGroup, score text, a reward strip, a 'Next' button, and a 'Home' button. The JSON follows schema 5.0.0. Missing assets include the star icon sprite.
evals.expected_output: A Unity prefab created at Assets/Game/Prefabs/UI/screen_level_complete.prefab. All 10+ GameObjects from the tree are created with correct parent-child relationships. RectTransform anchors/pivots/positions match the detection JSON. Missing star sprite results in placeholder Images with color_hint applied. All TextMeshProUGUI nodes have LocalizeUIText component. UIAnimationBehaviour added to root (type is level_complete). Non-interactive elements have raycast:false. Build summary printed with node count, component count, missing asset count.

assertions.text: Every node from the detection JSON tree has a corresponding GameObject in the hierarchy
Parent-child relationships match the detection JSON tree structure
Star icon nodes have Image with null sprite and color set to the color_hint from missing_assets
Every node with TextMeshProUGUI also has a LocalizeUIText component
Root node has UIAnimationBehaviour component (screen type is level_complete)
Non-interactive Images and all TextMeshProUGUI have raycast:false. Only Button/Toggle parent Images have raycast:true
Build summary includes GameObjects created count, components added count, and missing assets count

evals.prompt: Build this shop screen from /tmp/shop_detection.json. It has a top bar, filter tabs (Toggle + ToggleGroup), a ScrollRect with viewport (RectMask2D) and content (VerticalLayoutGroup + ContentSizeFitter), and 3 item rows inside the scroll content. None of the sprites exist in the project. Schema 5.0.0.
evals.expected_output: Prefab created with ScrollRect properly wired: viewport references the viewport child GO, content references the content child GO. RectMask2D on viewport node. ContentSizeFitter on content node. ToggleGroup wired on filter container. All sprites missing results in colored placeholders. No console errors.

assertions.text: ScrollRect component has viewport and content properties referencing the correct child GameObjects
Viewport node has RectMask2D component (not Mask)
Content node has ContentSizeFitter with vertical_fit = PreferredSize
All missing sprites result in visible placeholder Images with color_hint colors
No Unity console errors after build (checked via console-get-logs)

evals.prompt: I have a detection JSON at /tmp/settings_detection.json for a settings screen. It includes: a Slider component for volume, Toggle components for sound/music/notifications, a TMP_Dropdown for language selection, and several text labels. Schema 5.0.0. Build it as a prefab.
evals.expected_output: Prefab created with correct component types: Slider (with fill/handle child structure wired), Toggle (with checkmark graphic wired), TMP_Dropdown (with options set). Settings screen type should NOT get UIAnimationBehaviour. All text nodes have LocalizeUIText.

assertions.text: Slider component has fillRect and handleRect referencing correct child RectTransforms
Toggle components have graphic property referencing checkmark child Image
TMP_Dropdown has correct options list populated
Settings screen root does NOT have UIAnimationBehaviour (type is 'settings', not popup/level_complete/level_fail)
Every TextMeshProUGUI node has LocalizeUIText component
